action.reasoning: Observation: New best success_rate=0.684 (up from 0.646), with 1.0 on 6 envs (DoorKey/KeyCorridor/Lava*/Unlock/DistShift) and strong FourRooms(0.84); still 0.0 on LockedRoom/Dynamic-Obstacles/MultiRoom after ~108M steps. Analysis: FlatObs+MlpPolicy+SB3 PPO multi-task with bias+continued training works well for most but hardest long-horizon tasks need either dedicated curricula, custom features, or 10x more steps (not feasible). Training stable but time budget critically low (~3.8min left after this ~2.4min iter). Decision: Halt further training to avoid timeout/forgetting; current checkpoint is best, submit_eval not needed again as latest eval already recorded, conclude experiment.
action.done_reason: Time budget nearly exhausted after new best of 0.684; no safe room for more training without risk of timeout or regression on solved tasks.
